name: code-virtuoso
description: Skills, agents, and playbooks for software engineering

plugins.name: code-virtuoso
plugins.description: 43 skills and 15 agents for software engineering — knowledge (design patterns, SOLID, testing, security, clean architecture, and more), tools (ticket writer, PR message writer, report writer, rules writer, and more), frameworks (Symfony, Django, LangChain), playbooks (PHP upgrade, ticket delivery, worktree ops, and more), roles and agents (product manager, architect, backend dev, frontend dev, QA, project manager, scrum master, plus 8 specialist agents)
